name: Forbes. 30 to 30
overview: The Russian Forbes magazine's "30 under 30" rating includes not the owners of billions of dollars and the country's largest entrepreneurs, but the most promising and talented specialists in a wide range of spheres of human life who have not yet turned 30 years old. They are changing the world, and they are the future of Russia. They have already achieved significant success in business, science, technology, media or art, but this is only the beginning of a long journey.
